name: crystal-spell-caverns
description: Crystal Spell Caverns — an adaptive, gamified spelling adventure for iPad (ages 8-10).
comment: Intentionally DEPENDENCY-FREE: the app has no bundler/runtime npm deps, the build (scripts/build_deploy.mjs) uses only Node built-ins, and the Cloudflare Pages Function imports only pure local code — so `npm ci` on the host installs nothing and can't drift. LOCAL-ONLY tools install without touching this file: `npm i --no-save playwright` (smoke/QA) and `npm i --no-save @breezystack/lamejs` (audio gen). Reviving the Netlify fallback (netlify/functions/sync.mjs) needs `npm i @netlify/blobs`.
